Papers Writing Notes

"Curiouser and curiouser!" Cried Alice.

Selected papers

Preprints

Post-hoc large-sample statistical inference
B. Chugg*, E. Gauthier*, M.I. Jordan, A. Ramdas, I. Waudby-Smith.
Closed-form empirical Bernstein confidence sequences for scalars and matrices
B. Chugg, A. Ramdas.
Rao-Blackwellized e-variables
D. de Roos*, B. Chugg*, P. Grünwald, A. Ramdas.
A variational approach to dimension-free self-normalized concentration
B. Chugg, A. Ramdas.
